result.reason: To enhance configuration management by allowing users to merge settings from different files and automatically export configurations.
result.approach: Extend existing configuration loading/saving mechanisms to support merging multiple configuration files and implement a new service to handle automatic exporting of the active configuration based on user-defined triggers. This will likely involve modifying ILoader/ISaver implementations in mRemoteNG/Config/Serializers and adding UI elements in mRemoteNG/UI/Forms/OptionsPages/ConfigurationPage.cs.
